productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Chuck Taylor All Star Print Black Casual Shoes
description: The Chuck Taylor All Star is a symbol of originality and self-expression the world over. The pioneers that put the lsquo;squeakrsquo; in Basketball have been an off-the-court favourite of rock stars and rebels for the past 60 years. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite. Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Graffiti print all over the upper Central lacing for maximum style Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Eyelets on the side for ventilation Midsole Midsole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe and heel region and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm waterWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
